text: A patient refuses your care. You should:

options.text: Fill out and personally sign a "Refusal of Care" form.
Proceed with patient assessment and management and ignore the refusal.
Find a relative or family member to give you consent.
Have the patient and a witness sign the "Refusal of Care" form.

explanation: When a competent adult refuses care, it is legally imperative to document the refusal properly to protect the responder. Having the patient and a witness sign a 'Refusal of Care' form validates that the risks of refusal were explained and understood.
